_comment: Halen Plugin Store curated index. Fetched over HTTPS from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lukataylo/halen/main/plugin-registry.json by the in-app Plugin Store. Schema is documented in plugin-registry.schema.md (sibling file). The two entries below are illustrative examples — replace `downloadURL` with a real plugin-directory zip before shipping a live registry.

plugins.name: Hello (Example)
plugins.summary: Example registry entry — logs every text.pause event to the unified log.
plugins.author: Halen Team

plugins.name: Standup Notes (Example)
plugins.summary: Example registry entry — drafts a daily standup summary from your recent activity.
plugins.author: Halen Team
